messages.content: Looking to get charger for our Rambo bikes
Could you please provide the specific model of your Rambo bike? Different models may require different chargers.

You can find the model name and serial number in two locations on your Rambo bike: 
1. On a white sticker located on the outside of the bike box it came in.
2. On the frame of the bike, just below the battery. 
Once you have that information, I can help you find the correct charger for your bike.
Could you please confirm the exact model name of your Rambo bike? For example, is it a Promax model or another name? This will help me find the right charger for you.
Could you please provide the exact model name of your Rambo bike? For example, is it a Promax, Dominator, Rebel, or another model? This will help me find the right charger for you.
Could you please confirm the exact model name of your Rambo bike? For example, is it a Rebel, Dominator, or another model? This will help me find the right charger for you.
Could you please confirm the year of your Promax bike? This will help me ensure I provide the correct charger information.

To help you find the right charger, could you describe any specific features of your Promax bike or any other identifiers? For example, does it have a display type or any unique characteristics? This will help narrow it down.
To assist you better, could you please confirm the exact model name of your bike? For example, is it a Promax 1.0, 2.0, or another version? This will help me find the correct charger for you.
